case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. TORRE, FLORENCE M. DELA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRE, FLORENCE M. DELA $1,717.02 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,797.02

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,776.88 AS TO DEFENDANT TORRE, FLORENCE M. DELA
